title: Opening Reflection
summary: This section introduces Arjuna's first emotional response and frames the opening tension of the chapter.
insight_caption: This opening section frames the emotional tension of the chapter and prepares the reader for Krishna's teaching on duty, clarity, and detachment.

title: Discipline in Action
summary: This section collects verses that deepen Krishna's teaching on disciplined work, emotional balance, and clarity in decision-making.
insight_caption: This section groups teachings on disciplined action, showing how responsibility, steadiness, and higher purpose refine the quality of work.

title: Wisdom and Equanimity
summary: This section focuses on inner balance, steadiness in judgment, and the refinement of understanding through practice.
insight_caption: This section emphasizes equanimity and wise judgment, showing how balance matures insight and conduct.

title: Detachment and Service
summary: This section emphasizes service, self-offering, and the shift away from ego-centered motivation.
insight_caption: This section focuses on service and non-possessiveness, showing how work changes when ego loosens its grip.

title: Steady Vision
summary: This section gathers verses about mature vision, steadiness, and freedom from agitation.
insight_caption: This section turns toward mature steadiness, where clarity is no longer occasional but increasingly stable.

title: Closing Resolve
summary: This final section completes the chapter by drawing the teaching toward resolve, endurance, and spiritual completion.
insight_caption: This final section completes the chapter's movement by drawing its teaching toward resolve and enduring commitment.
